result.stderr:
Bottlecap.Net.GraphQL.Generation.Cli 1.0.2
Copyright (C) 2026 Bottlecap.Net.GraphQL.Generation.Cli

  -n, --namespace    Required. The namespace the generated types classes will be
                     in.

  -o, --output       Required. The output path the generated types classes will
                     be created in

  -i, --input        Required. The input paths of the dlls that contain the
                     classes to generated GraphQL objects for

  -v, --verbose      Determines if generation output should be verbose

  -t, --templates    Optional directory containing overrides for the inbuilt
                     templates

  --help             Display this help screen.

  --version          Display version information.
